One Voice, One Nation

Organised by Prasar Bharati under the theme — Fit Body, Fit Mind. Stronger Together.

A Moment
with Family

A cherished memory captured in the frame of history — shared at the Celebration of 90 Years of Akashvani. Run the Legacy. Feel the Pulse.

📍 Agartala, Tripura  •  22 May 2026
PROUD
FROM MY HEART ❤️

In My Own Words

"Today I proudly participated in the Marathon / Walkathon organized by our office, Akashvani Agartala. The presence and enthusiasm of the participants were truly eye-catching, filled with energy, spirit, and excitement. It was a wonderful experience, and I enjoyed every moment of it. Feeling proud to be a part of Akashvani and its glorious journey."

— With Pride & Gratitude  |  22 May 2026
